requirements.summary: Debug and fix the OTP login flow end-to-end: verify that clicking Send OTP triggers the backend sendOTP method, displays appropriate loading state, and shows the OTP verification screen upon success
acceptanceCriteria: Send OTP button triggers backend sendOTP call with mobile number
Loading state displays while backend request is in progress
OTP verification screen appears after successful OTP send
Error messages display if sendOTP fails

file_operations.description: Implement useSendOTP mutation hook that calls actor.sendOTP with mobile number, handles loading states, success, and error responses

Wire useSendOTP mutation into Send OTP button click handler, display loading state during mutation (isLoading), show OTP verification screen on success (step 2), and display error messages on failure using toast or error state

requirements.summary: Verify OTP verification flow: ensure that entering a valid 6-digit OTP and clicking Verify & Login calls the backend verifyOTP method, authenticates the user, and redirects to the dashboard for existing users
acceptanceCriteria: Verify & Login button triggers backend verifyOTP call with mobile number and OTP code
Successful verification redirects existing users to dashboard
Invalid OTP shows error message without redirecting

file_operations.description: Implement useVerifyOTP mutation hook that calls actor.verifyOTP with mobile number and OTP code, returns AuthResult with isNewUser flag, userId, and authenticated status

Wire useVerifyOTP mutation into Verify & Login button, display loading state during verification, on success call useOTPAuth.login(mobileNumber) to set authentication state, redirect existing users (isNewUser=false) to dashboard using router navigation, show signup form for new users (isNewUser=true), and display error messages for invalid OTP
Ensure login method persists mobile number and isAuthenticated=true to localStorage, and expose these values via context for route protection in App.tsx

requirements.summary: Verify new user signup flow: ensure that after successful OTP verification for a new mobile number, the signup form appears with Full Name and Class/Course fields, and submitting creates the user profile and redirects to dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: New users see signup form after OTP verification
Signup form submission creates user profile with provided details

file_operations.description: Implement useSignup mutation hook that calls actor.signup with SignupInput (name and mobileNumber), returns UserProfile, and invalidates currentUserProfile query on success

Add signup form step (step 3) that appears when isNewUser=true after OTP verification, collect Full Name and Class/Course fields, wire useSignup mutation to form submission, display loading state during signup, redirect to dashboard on successful signup, and ensure authentication state persists via useOTPAuth

requirements.summary: Ensure useOTPAuth hook properly integrates with backend actor methods (sendOTP and verifyOTP) and maintains authentication state across page refreshes using localStorage
acceptanceCriteria: useOTPAuth hook calls backend sendOTP and verifyOTP methods via useActor
Authentication state (mobile number, isAuthenticated) persists in localStorage
App.tsx route protection correctly reads authentication state from useOTPAuth
Logout clears authentication state from localStorage

file_operations.description: Ensure login method stores mobile number and isAuthenticated=true in localStorage, initialize state from localStorage on mount to persist across refreshes, ensure logout method clears localStorage keys and sets isAuthenticated=false, and expose mobileNumber and isAuthenticated via context

Verify that route protection logic correctly reads isAuthenticated from useOTPAuth context, redirects unauthenticated users to login page, and allows authenticated users to access protected routes (dashboard, subjects, syllabus)
